description: Standards Library index — all packs, versions, applicability filters, and categories (STD-01).

categories.name: Engineering Standards
categories.description: Language, framework, tooling, repo structure, coding conventions, dependency policy.

categories.name: Design Standards
categories.description: Typography, layout, component styling, spacing, accessibility baseline, brand application.

categories.name: Security Standards
categories.description: Auth/session baseline, authorization enforcement, sensitive data handling, abuse controls.

categories.name: Quality Standards
categories.description: Verification checks, coverage expectations, acceptance/proof discipline, performance checks.

categories.name: Operations Standards
categories.description: Environment expectations, deployment constraints, secrets/config management, observability, backup/recovery.

categories.name: Interface/Contract Standards
categories.description: API error model, versioning/compatibility, event/webhook conventions, contract naming.

categories.name: Analytics/Telemetry Standards
categories.description: Event naming, required metadata, metric definitions, privacy constraints for telemetry.
